events.description: When editing begins. Detail: `{ messageId, content }`.
events.name: loquix-edit-start

events.description: When the user confirms the edit. Detail: `{ messageId, oldContent, newContent }`.
events.name: loquix-edit-submit

events.description: When the user cancels the edit. Detail: `{ messageId }`.
events.name: loquix-edit-cancel

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Editing mode: `inline` (textarea in bubble) or `composer` (text to main input).

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Current message text. Passed as a JS property (not attribute).

attributes.name: editing
attributes.description: Whether the component is currently in editing state.

attributes.name: submit-label
attributes.description: Label for the submit button (inline mode).

declarations.summary:
Action button for editing user messages. Supports inline and composer modes.

In **inline** mode, clicking the trigger replaces the message content with an
editable textarea plus Save & Cancel buttons.

In **composer** mode, clicking the trigger dispatches `loquix-edit-start` so the
host application (or `<loquix-chat-container>`) can transfer the text to the main
composer input. The component shows an "Editing…" badge until editing completes.

members.description: MIME type or extension shorthand (e.g. 'image/png', 'pdf', 'ts')

members.description: File size in bytes

members.description: Semantic purpose of this attachment

members.description: Whether the chip can be removed

members.name: status
members.description: Upload/processing status

members.name: progress
members.description: Upload progress 0-100

members.description: Unique attachment id (used in events)

members.name: error
members.description: Error message (shown in tooltip when status is 'error')

members.name: maxFilenameLength
members.description: Max filename length before truncation (0 = no limit, uses CSS text-overflow)

members.name: noRetry
members.description: Hides the retry button on error state

members.name: preview
members.description: URL for a thumbnail preview image (shown instead of the auto emoji icon)

members.name: _safePreviewUrl
members.description:
Sanitised preview URL — allows blob:, https:, http: protocols.
For data: URLs, only `data:image/*` is permitted (excluding `data:image/svg+xml`
which can contain executable scripts).

members.name: _prevWidth
members.description: Captured chip width before a status change re-render

members.name: _widthTimer
members.description: Timer id for deferred cleanup after width transition

members.name: _truncateFilename
members.description: Truncate filename preserving extension: "very-long-name.pdf" → "very-lo…me.pdf"

members.name: _closeSvg
members.default: svg`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/></svg>`

members.name: _errorSvg
members.default: svg`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></svg>`

members.name: _retrySvg
members.default: svg`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="23 4 23 10 17 10"/><path d="M20.49 15a9 9 0 1 1-2.12-9.36L23 10"/></svg>`

members.default: svg`<svg class="trigger__icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>`

members.name: openFilePicker
members.description:
Programmatically opens the native file picker dialog.
Respects `disabled` and `maxFiles` constraints.

members.name: addFiles
members.description:
Programmatically add files (e.g. from paste or external drop).
Respects `disabled`, `acceptedTypes`, `maxSize`, and `maxFiles` constraints.

members.name: _processFiles
members.description:
Centralized validation for files from both the file-input and drag-and-drop.
Filters by acceptedTypes (MIME type and extension), maxSize, multiple flag,
and maxFiles remaining capacity. Returns the validated subset of files.

members.name: _emitValidFiles
members.description: Run validation then dispatch the attachment-add event.

cssParts.description: Outer wrapper of the message row.

cssParts.description: Header area inside the bubble (model name, timestamp).

slots.description: Content rendered above the bubble (e.g. attachments without bubble background).
slots.name: above-bubble

slots.description: Content rendered below the bubble (e.g. metadata, attachments).

members.name: sender
members.description: Role of the message sender.

members.name: status
members.description: Current status of the message.

members.name: model
members.description: Model name to display in the header.

members.name: timestamp
members.description: Timestamp string to display in the header.

members.name: messageId
members.description: Unique message identifier.

members.name: privateMode
members.description: Whether private mode is on (hides model info).

members.name: showAvatar
members.description: Whether to show the avatar column. Hidden by default.

members.name: avatarSize
members.description: Size of the built-in avatar when shown.

members.name: actionsPosition
members.description: Placement of the actions toolbar relative to the bubble.

members.name: collapseHeight
members.description: Max height (px) for user message content before collapsing. 0 = no limit.

members.name: _collapsed
members.description: Whether the user message is currently collapsed.

members.name: _overflows
members.description: Whether the content overflows the collapse height.

members.name: _editing
members.description: Whether inline editing is active.

members.name: _editContent
members.description: Content snapshot for inline editing.

members.name: _editSubmitLabel
members.description: Custom labels captured from the trigger element.

members.name: _isCollapsed
members.description: True only when the user message actually needs collapsing right now.

members.name: _getMessageText
members.description: Extract text content from the default (unnamed) slot, excluding attachment components.

members.name: _resetEditTriggers
members.description: Reset editing state on any slotted action-edit triggers.

members.name: _inlineOnAvatarSide
members.description: Whether inline actions go on the same side as the avatar.

attributes.description: Whether private mode is on (hides model info).

declarations.name: LoquixMessageList

slots.description: Content shown when no messages are present.
slots.name: empty-state

members.name: autoScroll
members.description: Whether to auto-scroll to the bottom on new content.

members.name: virtualize
members.description: Enable virtual scrolling (no-op in Phase 1).

members.name: showTimestamps
members.description: Whether to show timestamps on messages.

members.name: showScrollAnchor
members.description: Whether to show the scroll-to-bottom anchor button.

members.name: scrollOnSend
members.description: Whether to auto-scroll to bottom when a loquix-submit event is detected.

members.name: _autoScrollController
members.default: new AutoScrollController(this, { onScrollStateChange: (isAtBottom: boolean) => { this._showAnchor = !isAtBottom; if (isAtBottom) { this.dispatchEvent(createLoquixEvent('loquix-scroll-bottom', {})); } else { this.dispatchEvent( createLoquixEvent('loquix-scroll-away', { scrollTop: this._scrollContainer?.scrollTop ?? 0, }), ); } }, })

members.name: scrollToBottom
members.description: Programmatically scroll to the bottom.

members.name: scrollToMessage
members.description: Scroll to a message element by its message-id attribute.

events.description: When scroll reaches the bottom.
events.name: loquix-scroll-bottom

events.description: When scroll moves away from the bottom.
events.name: loquix-scroll-away

attributes.name: auto-scroll
attributes.description: Whether to auto-scroll to the bottom on new content.

attributes.name: show-timestamps
attributes.description: Whether to show timestamps on messages.

attributes.name: show-scroll-anchor
attributes.description: Whether to show the scroll-to-bottom anchor button.

attributes.name: scroll-on-send
attributes.description: Whether to auto-scroll to bottom when a loquix-submit event is detected.

declarations.summary: Scrollable container for chat messages with auto-scroll support.

declarations.name: LoquixModeSelector

members.name: modes
members.description: Array of mode options.

members.name: value
members.description: Currently selected mode value.

members.name: variant
members.description: Rendering variant.

members.name: showDescription
members.description: Show mode descriptions (tabs/pills variants and dropdown options).

members.name: stacked
members.description: Stack description below label instead of inline (tabs/pills variants).

members.name: disabled
members.description: Whether the selector is disabled.

members.name: open
members.description: Whether the dropdown panel is open (dropdown variant only).

members.name: _chevronSvg
members.default: svg`<svg class="trigger__chevron" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg>`

members.name: _checkSvg
members.default: svg`<svg class="option__check" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>`

events.description: Fired when the selected mode changes. Detail: { from, to }
events.name: loquix-mode-change

attributes.name: show-description
attributes.description: Show mode descriptions (tabs/pills variants and dropdown options).

attributes.name: stacked
attributes.description: Stack description below label instead of inline (tabs/pills variants).

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the dropdown panel is open (dropdown variant only).

declarations.summary: Switches between AI operating modes with four rendering variants.
